title: 2 Bird Spikes 2 Pack
description: We all love our gardens, making them look fantastic with all kinds of accessories such as plants, ornaments, benches etc that will stand out to add a extra element to your home. Sometimes you'll get a pack of birds landing around your property which can be frustrating because they'll start nesting and leaving dropping everywhere, you don't want that but luckily there's a way in which this can be stopped. Protect your garden from the birds and pests with these easy fit rigid plastic spikes which will help prevent the build up of bird waste .This is a safe humane way to deter birds and animals from eating or playing in your planters without harming them. These spikes can be used on walls, sills, ledges & fences.
